description: Multi-platform content scheduling and distribution workflow. Accepts finalized content and queues or schedules posts across up to 4 platforms via the active publishing connector. Human confirmation required before every post.

steps.label: Schedule post per platform
steps.input_from: captions, hashtags, caller.media_urls, caller.scheduled_datetimes, caller.ftc_disclosures, caller.is_aigc, caller.board_names
steps.notes: Human confirmation required before this atom sends to any connector. Present the full confirmation table first.

steps.label: Post status check (optional)
steps.notes: Offer to run after all posts are queued. Only required when connector returned status: processing.

steps.label: Quality gate verification
steps.notes: Integrity gate verifies FTC disclosures and AIGC flags. Safety gate checks prohibited content patterns. Brand alignment gate verifies captions match platform conventions.
